name: stem-studio
description: Desktop tool that separates a married film soundtrack into Dialogue, Music, and SFX stems — WAV output plus optional multitrack video for NLE import.
author: Sam Wasserman

scripts.build:mcp: npm --prefix mcp ci && npm --prefix mcp run build && npm --prefix mcp run smoke:packaged
scripts.package:mac: npm run prepare:ffmpeg:mac && node scripts/audit-media-binaries.mjs --platform mac && npm run notices:check && npm run build:mcp && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.package:win: npm run prepare:win-runtime && node scripts/audit-media-binaries.mjs --platform windows && npm run notices:check && npm run build:mcp && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --x64 --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
